positive_feedback: IN1: four stance invariants, mode selection and R3 frame options make non-prescription observable; test_ubm_consult_contract detects prescription stance and required frame/transcript elements.

OUT1/OUT2: R1→R4 manifest and prompts preserve user-owned wording, role=user provenance and action/reflection closure. validate-consult-session --ephemeral relaxes only persistence consent, not the stance/transcript checks; the reference example was corrected to show this branch explicitly.

C1-C4: graph/router consult is read-only with documented zero-hit fallback, persistence is consent-gated and kept outside the vault, goal creation delegates to run-ubm-goal-setting. UBM plugin 199 tests PASS.

notes: The only review finding was an ambiguous validator example for persistence_consent=false; iteration 2 added the explicit --ephemeral branch. All four elegance conditions PASS.
